1057.issue: [E1057] js-controller 5.0.19 listed as dependency but 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please update dependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/smarthausleben/ioBroker.wamo/blob/master/io-package.json).

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.4.1 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3009.issue: [W3009] Workflow "test-and-release.yml" is missing recommended concurrency configuration. See "https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.example/blob/e7db900495bb3c2b89dc35d863dda4ccf33f5def/JavaScript/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml#L17" for details.

3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3018.issue: [S3018] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is missing required permissions "contents: write" and "id-token: write" at job level. Trusted publishing will not work without them.

3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3020.issue: [E3020] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 18 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3022.issue: [E3022] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" uses node.js 14 which is below the minimum required version 24. Please update to node.js 24.

3024.issue: [W3024] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix uses node.js 18 which is not in the list of recommended testing versions (20, 22, 24).

3025.issue: [E3025] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" matrix is missing required node.js version 24. Tests with node.js 24 are required.
